description: Single source of truth for S-expression operators. Used by almadar-core, almadar-evaluator, almadar-std, and orbital-rust.

ml-effect.description: ML execution effects: forward, train, evaluate (Python compile target)

ml-graph.description: Graph construction and operations (Python compile target)

ml-data.description: Data loading and preprocessing (Python compile target)

std-os.description: OS-level event watchers for system triggers (file system, processes, network, signals)

std-agent.description: Agent intelligence: memory, context, tools, LLM, sessions

prob/seed.description: Set seeded PRNG for deterministic sampling

prob/flip.description: Bernoulli trial (coin flip with probability p)

prob/condition.description: Reject current sample if predicate is false

prob/sample.description: Evaluate expression n times, collect results

prob/posterior.description: Rejection sampling: returns accepted query values

prob/infer.description: Inference with summary stats (mean, variance, acceptRate)

prob/credible-interval.description: Symmetric credible interval [lo, hi] from samples

os/watch-files.description: Register file system watcher. Emits OS_FILE_MODIFIED, OS_FILE_CREATED, OS_FILE_DELETED events.

os/watch-process.description: Register process monitor. Emits OS_PROCESS_EXITED, OS_PROCESS_STARTED events.

os/watch-port.description: Register port monitor. Emits OS_PORT_OPENED, OS_PORT_CLOSED events.

os/watch-http.description: Register HTTP response interceptor. Emits OS_HTTP_RESPONSE events.

os/watch-cron.description: Register cron schedule. Emits OS_CRON_FIRE events.

os/watch-signal.description: Register OS signal handler. Emits OS_SIGNAL_USR1, OS_SIGNAL_HUP, etc.

os/watch-env.description: Register environment variable watcher. Emits OS_ENV_CHANGED events.

os/debounce.description: Configure debounce interval (ms) for an OS event type.

forward.description: Run forward pass through architecture tree

agent/memories.description: List active memories. Optional category filter

agent/decay.description: Run decay pass. Returns forgotten count

agent/switch-provider.description: Switch LLM provider and optionally model

agent/invoke.description: Execute an agent tool by name

agent/fork.description: Fork session. Returns new branch ID

agent/search-code.description: Search public repos for code patterns
